title: Imperial Knights
specialty: Armoured noble warfare · fast assault · anti-armour and anti-infantry
lore: Imperial Knights are massive humanoid war machines piloted by a single noble warrior — the scion of one of the great Knight Houses that pledge fealty to either the Adeptus Mechanicus or directly to the Imperium. Standing eight to ten metres tall, a single Knight is a match for a main battle tank.

The pilot bonds with the Knight through the Throne Mechanicum — a psychic interface that opens the warrior's mind to the machine spirit of the armour and to the accumulated memories of every previous Knight pilot who sat in the same Throne. This experience, called the Becoming, is overwhelming and sometimes fatal.

Knight Houses are aristocratic institutions with feudal structures, strict codes of honour, and complex obligations to their Forge World patrons or Imperial overlords. Houses aligned with the Mechanicus are called Questor Mechanicus; those of independent Imperial allegiance are Questor Imperialis.
